title: Asset Count
excerpt: Add a count of assets in a cell, i.e. 1/24, 2/24, 3/24 so that when a user is scrolling through multiple assets they know where the beginning and end of the loop is.

posts.author: kbyars (Kate Byars)
posts.cookedHtml: Add a count of assets in a cell, i.e. 1/24, 2/24, 3/24 so that when a user is scrolling through multiple assets they know where the beginning and end of the loop is.
